title: Democrats to introduce legislation to reign in 'rogue' Supreme Court
shortDescription: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said she and Jamie Raskin will introduce legislation to “rein in a fundamentally unaccountable and rogue” Supreme Court.

title: Donald Trump, Hunter Biden trials are over – the impact will linger
shortDescription: The convictions of Donald Trump and Hunter Biden are changing the 2024 presidential campaign in ways the campaigns are trying to assess.

title: North Dakota passed age limits for Congress. But is it legal?
shortDescription: How old is too old to run for Congress? Voters in North Dakota approved a ballot measure but is it enforceable?

title: This Biden ad attacking Trump isn't new. It's from 2019 | Fact check
shortDescription: The ad is real, but it isn't new. It debuted in 2019 as part of Biden's 2020 presidential campaign.

title: Army veteran Sam Brown wins Nevada's GOP Senate primary
shortDescription: The highly anticipated U.S. Senate race in Nevada is now set between Republican Sam Brown and Democratic incumbent, Sen. Jacky Rosen.

title: No, Trump did not 'blow off' post-sentencing report | Fact check
shortDescription: Donald Trump has taken part in a post-conviction interview with New York's probation department. He did not "blow off" any required reports.

title: Ohio special election results: Republican wins to claim US House seat
shortDescription: Ohio State Senator Michael Rulli won a special election for a congressional seat. His poll results lagged other recent Republicans in the area.

title: White House won't rule out commuting Hunter Biden's sentence
shortDescription: Joe Biden has said he will accept the outcome of Hunter Biden's gun case and not pardon his son, but the White House would not rule out a commutation.

title: Mother of Hunter Biden's child speaks out after conviction
shortDescription: Lunden Roberts, the mother of Hunter Biden’s five-year-old daughter, said in an interview she hopes Biden continues a positive relationship with Navy.

title: Nancy Mace beats GOP challengers in South Carolina primary
shortDescription: The Palmetto State's primary election resulted in Rep. Nancy Mace winning the GOP nomination for the House.

title: Jury: Hunter Biden guilty on all charges in gun trial | The Excerpt

title: House votes to hold Attorney General Merrick Garland in contempt of Congress
shortDescription: House Republicans passed their push to hold Attorney General Merrick Garland in contempt of Congress on Wednesday.

title: This constitutional provision could keep Trump out of jail if he wins
shortDescription: A section of the Constitution makes the federal government "the supreme Law of the Land." Trump could use it to halt state sentences or trials.

title: No, Trump didn't vow to 'save' Hunter Biden | Fact check
shortDescription: A Trump spokesperson told USA TODAY the image does not show a legitimate statement from the former president following Hunter Biden's conviction.

title: Juror says Hunter Biden prosecution was a 'waste of taxpayer dollars'
shortDescription: Two jurors gave interviews after they voted to convict Hunter Biden of firearms felonies during a trial in Wilmington Tuesday.

title: Trump volunteer force shares name with controversial group
shortDescription: If Trump wins in November, he'll become the 47th president but his campaign's latest initiative, dubbed "Force 47," shares name with foreign group.

title: Manhattan DA behind Trump conviction to testify in Congress July 12
shortDescription: Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg, who led the hush money prosecution of Donald Trump, is set to testify in Congress the day after sentencing

title: Pence warns of GOP shift but stops short of direct Trump criticism
shortDescription: The former vice president spoke at an event hosted by the Ethics & Religious Liberty Commission, the SBC's public policy arm.

title: Special counsel reacts to Hunter Biden verdict

title: A look at the downfall between Mike Pence and Donald Trump
shortDescription: The GOP frontrunner is expected to name vp choice at the Republican National Convention. What happened to his former right-hand man, Mike Pence?

shortDescription: Hunter Biden’s conviction in his federal gun trial is not the end of his legal drama.

title: Florida ban on transgender care for children ruled unconstitutional
shortDescription: Comments from Gov. Ron DeSantis and Florida legislators were cited in the judge's ruling as being "overtly biased against transgenders."
